hooks.command: printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' idle | base64) && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_project $(printf '%s' ${PWD##*/} | base64)
printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' running | base64) && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_start_time $(printf '%s' $(date +%s) | base64)

printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' blocked | base64) && terminal-notifier -title 'Permission Needed' -message "Approve in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:perm" -sound Basso -execute "[[ -n $WEZTERM_PANE ]] && /opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' waiting | base64) && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Waiting' -message "Needs input in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:input" -sound Basso -execute "[[ -n $WEZTERM_PANE ]] && /opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' idle | base64) && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Done' -message "Done in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD" -sound default -execute "[[ -n $WEZTERM_PANE ]] && /opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm
